positive: A hyper-detailed, stylized illustration of exotic botanical and celestial elements. Central composition featuring glowing bioluminescent mushrooms, graceful looping vines, and stylized crescent moons, framed symmetrically. The style is a blend of intricate Art Nouveau linework and crisp vector graphic design. High contrast, strong silhouettes, and perfect geometric balance. Color palette must be restricted to deep emerald, sapphire blue, and metallic gold against a pure white background. Flat graphic design, suitable for repeating or single-placement apparel prints.
negative: text, watermark, signature, logo, artifact, blur, grainy, noise, low contrast, cartoon, poorly drawn, disfigured, extra limbs, bad anatomy, depth of field, jpeg artifacts
